Variable.name: thisApp
Variable.Description: Application passed in from parent workflow

Variable.name: activeLinkIds
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable of active account link IDs

Variable.name: totalActiveLinks
Variable.Description: Overall count of active account links under the application

Variable.name: orphanLinks
Variable.Description: Used for tally of orphan account links during workflow execution

Variable.name: compliantLinks
Variable.Description: Used for tally of compliant account links during workflow execution

Variable.name: noncompliantLinks
Variable.Description: Used for tally of noncompliant account links during workflow execution

Variable.name: custom
Variable.Description: Ascension-Custom-AD-DomainMapping, used for Duo group lookup per domain

Variable.name: outOfScopeLinks
Variable.Description: Used for tally of out of scope account links during workflow execution
